item.title: How to Buy Crypto and Bitcoin Anonymously or Without Verification
item.description: One benefit cryptocurrencies have over fiat money is the ability for transactions to be anonymous.

item.title: How Much is an Emergency Vet Visit?
item.description: Money's guide of how much is an emergency vet visit.

item.title: How Much Does It Cost to Refinance a Mortgage?
item.description: Part of determining if a mortgage refinance is practical is weighing the balance between its benefits and costs.

item.title: Warren Buffett’s No. 1 Rule Every Retiree Should Live By
item.description: Avoiding common investing mistakes and focusing on the long term can help you avoid losing money.

item.title: Warren Buffett’s 3 Rules for Protecting Your Retirement Savings After 50
item.description: His first rule is to never lose money. Here's how.
